Your Healing Kitchen
Natural healing · Fourth trimester
Mineral tonic • Energy • Postpartum recovery

Adrenal Cocktail

Orange juice, coconut water, cream of tartar & salt — replaces the minerals stress & night feeds burn through.
Makes 1 glass
Time 2 min
Caffeine none
For you · the 3pm slump
When to drink Mid-morning or the afternoon dip, between meals. Not a bedtime drink (vitamin C is mildly energising).

Why this heals you

  • Orange juice — vitamin C + potassium verified
  • Coconut water — natural potassium & electrolytes verified
  • Cream of tartar — a rich potassium source verified
  • Sea salt — sodium for fluid balance tradition
Ingredients
½ cupOrange juice (fresh is best)
½ cupCoconut water
⅛ tspCream of tartar
a pinchSea salt
Method
1
Pour

½ cup orange juice + ½ cup coconut water into a glass.

2
Add minerals

Stir in ⅛ tsp cream of tartar + a pinch of sea salt until dissolved.

3
Sip

Drink slowly, ideally between feeds.

Just for you, Mum

Reach for this instead of a second coffee — caffeine on a depleted system worsens the wired-but-tired crash. Cream of tartar + coconut water = the potassium that steadies you.

Good to know
BestBetween meals, mid-afternoon.
NotToo close to bedtime.
Why we say this
Vitamin C, potassium (coconut water + cream of tartar) and sodium content are verified nutritional facts; the ‘adrenal support’ framing is honestly labelled tradition.
Main Meals
Snacks
Drinks
Desserts
Food, not medical advice · non-diagnostic · made for this season of motherhood
